title: Combining technology with compassionate care across three branches.
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Vitalvet is a veterinary...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Vitalvet is a veterinary health and retail group based in the Garden Route, with branches in George and Mossel Bay. While Vitalvet believes in always upskilling staff and upgrading equipment, it holds fast to the traditional strengths of staff who care.


> Good preventative care is our firm foundation, with vaccinations and parasite control front and centre. With a team of highly skilled veterinarians and a dedicated support team of veterinary nurses who are on site 24/7, Vitalvet is synonymous with quality, compassion and trust.


While Vitalvet Animal Medical Centre in Knysna Road is equipped with the latest in diagnostic tools, such as dental radiography; on site laboratory; ultrasonography; endoscopy and digital radiography, the team remains committed to the basics that truly make a difference in a pet’s life – good nutrition, parasite control, regular veterinary examinations and routine vaccinations.

We have put a lot of thought into our vaccination protocol which includes cover for zoonotic diseases like leptospirosis and very contagious diseases like parvo virus and distemper virus. We believe in vaccinating puppies until 16 weeks old and our protocol varies according to a pet’s life stage.

Vitalvet prides itself on being a one-stop shop, offering a broad range of trusted veterinary products and services. We price-match and if we don’t have it, we can source it for you. Visit our brand-new website, www.vitalvet.co.za, to find out more about our services, our excellent staff and how we can help keep your pets happy!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
